name: Chocolate Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, sugar, cocoa, baking powder, and salt together.
2. Add the water, applesauce, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients.
3. Stir until just moistened.
4. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square pan sprayed with Pam.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the cocoa and brown sugar.
6. Sprinkle this mixture evenly over the batter in the pan.
7. Pour the hot water evenly over everything.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
